prediction_outcome: partially confirmed: 4/4 linear replication ✓✓, quadratic robustness ✗ (only 21-22% retained, deep layers reverse). L16 survives: 32/32 heads, p<0.001. Ecological V|nums 4-5x > nums_R ✓✓
key_finding: Cross-model replication CONFIRMED under linear control (Phi≈Qwen). Quadratic position control reveals ~80% of signal is non-linear recency. L16 survives robustly (r=0.054, 32/32, all p<0.001). Information-directed attention is CROSS-MODEL but SMALLER than exp_096 indicated.
evidence_impact: CONFIRMS cross-model generality. SUBSTANTIALLY DOWNGRADES effect size (r≈0.05 not r≈0.24 after quadratic control). Non-linear recency identified as major confound. Exp_096 needs retrospective quadratic test.
next_planned: Apply quadratic control to Qwen (exp_096), or exponential/non-parametric position control

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: FINAL: K>V perturbation universal. K>V probing ENCODING-DEPENDENT. NOT driven by GQA.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL + ATTENTION: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive). H0 unique retrieval pattern (Exp 095).

natural_usage.status: STRONG: Probing (2 families + 2 sizes). Attention (Exp 095). Probe-attn correlation CROSS-MODEL (Exp 096+097) but quadratic control shows r≈0.05 not 0.24. Paraphrase NULL. WRRA on 2 families.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPREHENSIVE: Phase 1 (4 families). Phase 2 probing (2 families + 2 sizes). Probe-attn correlation replicated on Phi (Exp 097). K/V sweeps (3 models).

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY: digital→K>V probing, analog→V≥K probing.

attention_mechanism.status: REVISED (Exp 097): Info-directed attention is cross-model BUT quadratic control reveals ~80% is recency. L16 genuine signal r=0.054. Effect smaller than initially reported.
